2021-2022 NBA Player Stats

Home » NBA Stats » Player Stats » 2021-2022 NBA Player Stats

NBA Player Data in Excel
We deliver game-by-game NBA player datasets in Excel throughout the entire season. Updates will be available within 2 to 4 hours following the completion of the last game.
Learn More About NBA Player Datasets
Learn more about NBA player evaluation metrics and NBA player stats calculation methods.
Click column headers to sort NBA stats. Reverse the sort order by clicking on it twice.
Type any name in the search box to single out any NBA player stats.
You can pick multiple players from the drop-down menu respectively, to compare.

Jump to 2022 Playoffs

2021-2022 NBA Player Stats | Regular Season

RANKFULL NAMETEAMPOSAGEGPMPG[css3_tooltip header='Minutes Percentage' width='300px' content='Percentage of team minutes used by a player while he was on the floor' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]MIN%[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Usage Rate' width='300px' content='Usage rate, a.k.a., usage percentage is an estimate of the percentage of team plays used by a player while he was on the floor' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]USG%[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Turnover Rate' width='300px' content='A metric that estimates the number of turnovers a player commits per 100 possessions' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]TO%[/css3_tooltip]FTAFT%2PA2P%3PA3P%[css3_tooltip header='Effective Shooting Percentage' width='300px' content='With eFG%, three-point shots made are worth 50% more than two-point shots made. eFG% Formula=(FGM+ (0.5 x 3PM))/FGA' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]eFG%[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='True Shooting Percentage' width='300px' content='True shooting percentage is a measure of shooting efficiency that takes into account field goals, 3-point field goals, and free throws.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]TS%[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Points' width='300px' content='Points per game.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]PPG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Rebounds' width='300px' content='Rebounds per game.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]RPG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Total Rebound Percentage' width='300px' content='Total rebound percentage is estimated percentage of available rebounds grabbed by the player while the player is on the court.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]TRB%[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Assists' width='300px' content='Assists per game.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]APG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Assist Percentage' width='300px' content='Assist percentage is an estimated percentage of teammate field goals a player assisted while the player is on the court' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]AST%[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Steals' width='300px' content='Steals per game.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]SPG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Blocks' width='300px' content='Blocks per game.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]BPG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Turnovers' width='300px' content='Turnovers per game.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]TOPG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Versatility Index' width='300px' content='Versatility index is a metric that measures a player’s ability to produce in points, assists, and rebounds. The average player will score around a five on the index, while top players score above 10' position='left' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]VI[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Offensive Rating' width='300px' content='Individual offensive rating is the number of points produced by a player per 100 total individual possessions.' position='left' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]ORTG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Defensive Rating' width='300px' content='Individual defensive rating estimates how many points the player allowed per 100 possessions he individually faced while staying on the court.' position='left' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]DRTG[/css3_tooltip]

2021-2022 NBA Player Stats | Playoffs

RANKFULL NAMETEAMPOSAGEGPMPG[css3_tooltip header='Minutes Percentage' width='300px' content='Percentage of team minutes used by a player while he was on the floor' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]MIN%[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Usage Rate' width='300px' content='Usage rate, a.k.a., usage percentage is an estimate of the percentage of team plays used by a player while he was on the floor' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]USG%[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Turnover Rate' width='300px' content='A metric that estimates the number of turnovers a player commits per 100 possessions' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]TO%[/css3_tooltip]FTAFT%2PA2P%3PA3P%[css3_tooltip header='Effective Shooting Percentage' width='300px' content='With eFG%, three-point shots made are worth 50% more than two-point shots made. eFG% Formula=(FGM+ (0.5 x 3PM))/FGA' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]eFG%[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='True Shooting Percentage' width='300px' content='True shooting percentage is a measure of shooting efficiency that takes into account field goals, 3-point field goals, and free throws.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]TS%[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Points' width='300px' content='Points per game.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]PPG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Rebounds' width='300px' content='Rebounds per game.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]RPG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Total Rebound Percentage' width='300px' content='Total rebound percentage is estimated percentage of available rebounds grabbed by the player while the player is on the court.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]TRB%[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Assists' width='300px' content='Assists per game.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]APG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Assist Percentage' width='300px' content='Assist percentage is an estimated percentage of teammate field goals a player assisted while the player is on the court' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]AST%[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Steals' width='300px' content='Steals per game.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]SPG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Blocks' width='300px' content='Blocks per game.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]BPG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Turnovers' width='300px' content='Turnovers per game.' position='top_center' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]TOPG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Versatility Index' width='300px' content='Versatility index is a metric that measures a player’s ability to produce in points, assists, and rebounds. The average player will score around a five on the index, while top players score above 10' position='left' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]VI[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Offensive Rating' width='300px' content='Individual offensive rating is the number of points produced by a player per 100 total individual possessions.' position='left' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]ORTG[/css3_tooltip][css3_tooltip header='Defensive Rating' width='300px' content='Individual defensive rating estimates how many points the player allowed per 100 possessions he individually faced while staying on the court.' position='left' tag='a' style='style_33' delay='0' cursor='pointer' event='hover' ]DRTG[/css3_tooltip]
